title: TecnoMap
description: Integrate https://mappa.tecnocraft.net/ with your Minecraft instance to show your real-time position and server markers on a web map.
body:
## TecnoMap

**TecnoMap** integrates [mappa.tecnocraft.net](https://mappa.tecnocraft.net/) with your Minecraft client, displaying your real-time position and server-defined markers on a web-based map.

### Features

**Real-Time Position**  
Your current in-game location is displayed live on the map.

**Markers**  
Several key locations are marked and visible on the map, including:
- Parco Centrale  
- Legione Carabinieri "Chiaffredo Bergia"  
- Palazzo Sant'Ayama  
- Palazzo di Giustizia  
- Banca  
- Scuola  
- Caserma Vigili del Fuoco "Alberto Giombini"  
- [and much more](https://github.com/ReLoia/TecnoMap)

### How It Works

TecnoMap starts a lightweight HTTP REST server inside the Minecraft client on `http://localhost:8998`. It exposes:
- Real-time player coordinates  
- The markers (static and dynamic)  

These are accessed by the browser extension, which allows the map at [mappa.tecnocraft.net](https://mappa.tecnocraft.net/) to display your location and markers.

### Browser Extension

To allow the map website to communicate with the local server, a browser extension is required.

- **Firefox:**  
  Available on the official store:  
  [https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/tecnomap-extension/](https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/tecnomap-extension/)

- **Chrome (and other Chromium browsers):**  
  Must be installed manually due to Chrome Web Store fees:  
  [Download latest release](https://github.com/ReLoia/TecnoMap/releases/latest)

- **Source Code:**  
  [Extension branch on GitHub](https://github.com/ReLoia/TecnoMap/tree/extension)

### Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20.1 with Fabric installed  
- TecnoMap mod file placed in your `mods` folder  
- The browser extension installed in your preferred browser  

### Preview
